vocab.meaning: khơi dậy khát khao chiến thắng/tinh thần cạnh tranh
vocab.example: Engaging in high-intensity football matches helps me unleash my competitive drive after a long week at the office.
I’m particularly fond of swimming because it’s an excellent way to build aerobic endurance without straining the joints.

vocab.meaning: sự dâng trào hormone adrenaline (cảm giác hưng phấn)
vocab.example: Extreme sports like mountain biking provide a surge of adrenaline that is incredibly addictive for thrill-seekers.

vocab.meaning: sự phối hợp giữa tay và mắt
vocab.example: Table tennis is a fantastic sport for sharpening hand-eye coordination due to its incredibly fast pace.

vocab.meaning: nỗ lực hết mình/vắt kiệt sức lực
vocab.example: I love the feeling of physically exerting myself on the court, knowing I’ve given every ounce of energy to the game.

vocab.meaning: kỹ năng/năng lực thể thao xuất chúng
vocab.example: Although I lack the sporting prowess of a professional athlete, I still participate in local leagues for the sheer joy of it.

vocab.meaning: một màn trình diễn chiến thuật bậc thầy
vocab.example: Watching basketball is intriguing because every game is a tactical masterclass in positioning and teamwork.

vocab.meaning: xây dựng sức mạnh cơ bắp
vocab.example: My favorite pastime is weightlifting, as it allows me to systematically build muscular strength and improve my posture.

vocab.meaning: một cách để giải tỏa căng thẳng
vocab.example: Jogging through the park serves as a vital outlet for stress, helping me clear my mind after a taxing day.

vocab.meaning: sự ổn định của các nhóm cơ cốt lõi
vocab.example: Pilates has become my go-to sport recently because of its emphasis on core stability and flexibility.
